lede: A look at January 13 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Iker Bravo and Steven Michaels, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: President of the United States
events.desc: Outgoing U.S. President Donald Trump is impeached for a second time on a charge of incitement of insurrection following the January 6 United States Capitol attack one week prior.

events.title: 208996 Achlys
events.desc: 208996 Achlys was discovered by Chad Trujillo and Michael E. Brown at Palomar Observatory.

events.title: January 2001 El Salvador earthquake
events.desc: An earthquake hits El Salvador, killing more than 800.

events.title: Aden
events.desc: A month-long violent struggle begins in Aden, South Yemen between supporters of Ali Nasir Muhammad and Abdul Fattah Ismail, resulting in thousands of casualties.

events.title: Johnny Cash
events.desc: Johnny Cash performs live at Folsom State Prison.

events.title: HMS Truculent (P315)
events.desc: British submarine HMS Truculent collides with an oil tanker in the Thames Estuary, killing 64 men.

events.title: 1915 Avezzano earthquake
events.desc: The 6.7 Mw Avezzano earthquake shakes the Province of L'Aquila in Italy with a maximum Mercalli intensity of XI (Extreme), killing between 29,978 and 32,610.

events.title: National Geographic Society
events.desc: The National Geographic Society is founded in Washington, D.C.

events.title: Treaty of Cahuenga
events.desc: The Treaty of Cahuenga ends the Mexican–American War in California.

events.title: French Revolutionary Wars
events.desc: French Revolutionary Wars: A naval battle between a French ship of the line and two British frigates off the coast of Brittany ends with the French vessel running aground, resulting in over 900 deaths.

deaths.text: Abdul Fattah Ismail, Yemeni educator and politician, 4th President of South Yemen
Sylvanus Olympio, Togolese businessman and politician, President of Togo
Luc Urbain du Bouëxic, comte de Guichen, French admiral

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Veronica of Milan
Christian feast day: St. Knut's Day or Tjugondag Knut, the last day of Christmas. (Sweden and Finland)
